title: begonia tessaricarpa
intro: Begonia tessaricarpa, also known as the four-angled begonia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Begoniaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Begonia tessaricarpa include reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The plant can be used to make herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, although further research is needed to fully understand its effectiveness and potential side effects.
